title: GiveAll
body: GiveAll is a plugin that allows you to give items, money and xp using simple but powerful commands. ### **Features:** ***Give Items by Material Name*** You can give everyone items by specifying a material name You can specify the amount ***Give XP*** You can give everyone experience points and levels ***Give Money*** You can give everyone money (uses [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/)) ***Give Items From Hand*** You can give everyone the items you are holding in hand You can overwrite the amount of items with a higher or lower one ***Save and Give Items From Hand*** You can save the items you are holding in hand and give them a special name You can use the "give items by material name" feature with the custom name you saved to give everyone the item. You don't need to hold the item in hand while giving it You can overwrite the amount ***WORLD!*** If you only want to reward people that are in a specific world, you can do that as well! All the actions listed above can be done just in a specific world. ***RADIUS!*** If by everyone, you just mean people that are close to you, a radius can be specified for all of the actions listed above. ***WORLD + Radius!?*** YES! You can specify a world, a center point and a radius from that center point and only the people that are in that world that are also in radius will be rewarded. ***PlaceholderAPI Support*** Every message is customizable and supports [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/) placeholders. ***Vault Support*** Money can be given using a currency plugin that supports [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/). ***IP Checks*** Ability to customize who gets rewards if there are multiple people sharing an IP address! ### **Dependencies:** Java 17+ PlaceholderAPI Vault (**Not Required!**) ### **Commands:** ``` help - Executor: Any - Permission: giveall.help reload - Executor: Any - Permission: giveall.reload material [amount] - Executor: Any - Permission: giveall.use.base.material hand [amount] - Executor: Player - Permission: giveall.use.base.hand xp ["levels"] - Executor: Any - Permission: giveall.use.base.xp money - Executor: Any - Permission: giveall.use.base.money world material [amount] - Executor: Any - Permission: giveall.use.world.material world hand [amount] - Executor: Player - Permission: giveall.use.world.hand world xp - Executor: Any - Permission: giveall.use.world.xp world money - Executor: Any - Permission: giveall.use.world.money radius material [amount] - Executor: Player - Permission: giveall.use.radius.base.material radius hand [amount] - Executor: Player - Permission: giveall.use.radius.base.hand radius xp - Executor: Player - Permission: giveall.use.radius.base.xp radius money - Executor: Player - Permission: giveall.use.radius.base.money radius world center material [amount] - Executor: Any - Permission: giveall.use.radius.world.material radius world center hand [amount] - Executor: Any - Permission: giveall.use.radius.world.hand radius world center xp - Executor: Any - Permission: giveall.use.radius.world.xp radius world center money - Executor: Any - Permission: giveall.use.radius.world.money special-item save ["force"] - Executor: Player - Permission: giveall.use.special-item.save special-item remove - Executor: Any - Permission: giveall.use.special-item.remove special-item list [page] - Executor: Any - Permission: giveall.use.special-item.list ``` Aliases: /giveall, /gall ### **TODO:** Feel free to leave suggestions and report bugs on [GitHub](https://github.com/blitzoffline/giveall/issues)! If you use and enjoy this resource, don't forget to star.
